message:
feat(conformance,dtype): expand ufunc differential corpus and add integer wrapping cast tests

Extend the conformance differential framework with new test cases
targeting the wrapping integer cast behavior, update oracle fixtures
with corresponding NumPy reference outputs, and refresh RaptorQ
artifact bundles. The dtype module gains an additional helper for
the wrapping cast path.

- ufunc_differential.rs: add new differential test entries for
  integer wrapping edge cases, expand oracle validation, and
  refine existing corpus entries
- ufunc_input_cases.json: add ~60 new input cases for integer
  overflow wrapping, narrow dtype boundary values, and mixed-dtype
  arithmetic
- ufunc_oracle_output.json: add corresponding NumPy oracle outputs
- ufunc_differential_report.json and mismatch report: update with
  new pass/fail counts
- fnp-dtype/src/lib.rs: add helper for wrapping cast path validation
- artifacts/raptorq: regenerate all bundle artifacts (sidecar,
  decode_proof, scrub_report) for both benchmark and conformance
  bundles
- Update beads issue tracker

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
